summary:
The upper first molar typically has **three fossae** due to its four cusps creating three intercusp depressions. These consist of two major fossae—one central and one lingual—and one minor fossa located near the disto-mesial buccal region.

The correct answer is therefore Option C: Two major and one minor fosa.

Final Answer: \boxed{C}

Only summarize the agent’s actual reasoning—not your own interpretation.
